---
title: I. Validate the bundle
---

Validate the exported bundle with `make validate-upload`, and learn how to read
and act on the errors it reports.

::: {.callout-note}
## Coming soon
This page is part of the manual's skeleton. Its content is being written in
[issue #14](https://github.com/JeroenUMC/bp-sweden-web/issues/14).
:::
